_comment: English dictionary. Source-of-truth for keys; only used by translators as a reference. The engine skips substitutions for the EN locale and serves the HTML as-is.

home.about.heading: Redefining Housing Market
home.about.body: Make modular housing accessible everywhere in North America — from urban areas to the most remote communities.
home.about.counter.label: Years of Experience
home.achievement.heading: Shaping The Future With Every Success
home.achievement.body: Through innovative design and visionary solutions, we transform spaces, shaping a sustainable future built on creativity,
home.portfolio.heading: Modular Homes Across North America

home.blog.post3.title: Choosing the Perfect Color Palette For Your Space
home.faq.heading: Answers That Build Trust in Every Step
home.faq.body: We provide clear, transparent answers to client questions, ensuring confidence and trust throughout every project stage.
home.faq.q1: What types of architectural services do you provide?
home.faq.a1: We offer architectural design, interior design, renovation, planning, and project management tailored to residential and commercial projects.
home.faq.q2: How long does it take to complete a project?
home.faq.a2: Project timelines vary depending on size and complexity, typically ranging from a few weeks to several months.
home.faq.q3: Do you assist with both design and construction?
home.faq.a3: Yes, we support both design and construction, ensuring every stage of the project is executed smoothly.
home.faq.q4: What makes your architecture services unique?
home.faq.a4: Our work blends creativity, functionality, and sustainable design to create timeless and inspiring spaces.
home.faq.q5: Do you provide cost estimates before starting?
home.faq.a5: Yes, we provide clear cost estimates before starting to help clients plan their budget effectively.

footer.newsletter.body: Get exclusive design tips, trends, and inspiration delivered directly to your inbox.

about.hero.heading: Designing Timeless Spaces Where Art, Function, & Innovation Live in Perfect Harmony
about.body: Creating exceptional architectural and interior designs that seamlessly blend beauty, functionality, delivering timeless spaces tailored to inspire and elevate lifestyles.
about.process.heading: Our Proven Architectural Design Process
about.process.body:
A clear, structured approach to transform
creative visions into reality.
about.process.step1.title: Discover & Consultation
about.process.step1.body: We listen to your needs & understand your vision to set the foundation.
about.process.step2.title: Concept & Design
about.process.step2.body: Our team creates innovative concepts and detailed designs your project goals.
about.process.step3.title: Visualization & Refinement
about.process.step3.body: Experience realistic 3D renders and refine designs before moving execution.
about.process.step4.title: Build & Deliver
about.process.step4.body: We transform concepts into reality with precision, & on-time delivery.
about.cta.heading: Ready to Get Started?
about.cta.body: Clear and honest pricing, designed to match your needs perfectly.
about.team.heading: Introducing The Creative Minds Behind Our Designs
about.team.body:
Meet our talented designers turning visions into stunning,
functional spaces with creativity.
about.team.desc.guy_hawkins: Our team oversees construction, installation, finishing touches, delivering a flawless space that exceeds expectations.
about.team.desc.theresa_webb: We handle the entire workflow, including building, installing, and perfecting the smallest details, delivering a finished space that impresses and goes further than what clients envision.
about.team.desc.floyd_miles: From structural work to installation and meticulous finishing, our team takes full responsibility to create a flawless final space that truly surpasses expectations.
services.hero.heading: Explore Every Corner Of Our Interior Design Expertise
services.hero.body: From concept to completion, we craft unique, functional, and aesthetic spaces, blending creativity, innovation, and precision to transform every corner into timeless interior masterpieces
services.card.residential.title: Residential Distribution
services.card.residential.body: Prefab modular capsules and homes delivered and installed across Canada — a turnkey solution for homeowners, campgrounds, and cottage owners.
services.card.commercial.title: Commercial Distribution
services.card.commercial.body: Prefab modular units for offices, retail, and service spaces — fast installation, refined design, ready to operate.
services.card.institutional.title: Institutional Projects
services.card.institutional.body: Prefab housing solutions for subsidized projects, municipalities, and remote regions — proven logistics expertise in demanding conditions.
services.card.furniture.title: Furniture & Fixture  Selection
services.card.furniture.body: Curate the perfect mix of décor to match your style, budget, and functional needs.
services.process.heading: From Design to Installation
services.process.body:
Coordinated by our team
from the quote to the day you move in.

meta.description.home: High-end prefab modular homes delivered and installed across Canada. Quotes in 24 hours, turnkey from permit to install.

meta.description.services: Residential, commercial, and institutional prefab modular distribution — turnkey delivery and installation across Canada.
meta.description.contact: Contact Maison Novatio. Phone +1 (819) 448-4524, email renaud.theroux@overseaimportexports.com, based in Nicolet, Québec.
